name: Hylocitreidae
description: Hylocitreidae is a monotypic family of passerine bird endemic to the mountains of Sulawesi, Indonesia. The single species is also known as the Yellow-flanked Whistler and has unclear taxonomic affinities.

children.name: Hylocitrea
children.description: A monotypic genus of passerine bird endemic to the highlands of Sulawesi.

children.name: Hylocitrea bonthaina
children.description: The Hylocitrea is a plump, olive-green passerine with yellow flanks and a whistled song. It inhabits montane forest on Sulawesi, foraging for insects and fruit in the understory.
